mobile_guardrails: footer links collapse into a single-column stack
multi-token hero lines collapse into one-token-per-line on mobile
authority meta and CTA buttons may not overflow the page shell
all repository and evidence strings must allow hard wrapping

laws: Macro section movement happens only through declared section gap laws.
Generic product pages inherit homepage shell law and flagship authority grammar, not flagship-only editorial overrides.
Any packet binding fallback must be explicit and reviewable.
A canonical product page is lawful only when desktop and mobile overflow both stay at zero.
